name: JLCPCB / JLC3DP
description: JLCPCB API Platform and JLC3DP partner API discovery. Public pages confirm PCB, stencil, component, and 3D printing APIs, but detailed 3D printing quote/order endpoints require partner approval from JLCPCB/JLC3DP.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Partner API Key
credential_fields.description: JLCPCB/JLC3DP partner API credential. Leave blank until JLCPCB grants API access and provides endpoint-level documentation.

tools.name: get_api_platform_overview
tools.description: Fetch the public JLCPCB API Platform overview. Use this to confirm available API product families and application requirements.

tools.name: get_jlc3dp_api_application_info
tools.description: Fetch the public JLC3DP API application article. It describes Pricing API and Ordering API scope, supported 3D file formats, partner approval, and support contact.

tools.name: get_jlcpcb_api_help_catalog
tools.description: Fetch the JLCPCB API help catalog. Use this to find currently published API help articles before wiring any partner-specific endpoint.
